# generic-tool-369.sh

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# Install generic-tool-369
# Description: Auto-generated install script for generic-tool-369

echo "Installing generic-tool-369..."

if [ -x "$(command -v apt-get)" ]; then
    sudo apt-get update
    sudo apt-get install -y generic-tool-369
elif [ -x "$(command -v yum)" ]; then
    sudo yum install -y generic-tool-369
elif [ -x "$(command -v dnf)" ]; then
    sudo dnf install -y generic-tool-369
elif [ -x "$(command -v apk)" ]; then
    sudo apk add generic-tool-369
else
    echo "Unsupported package manager. Please install generic-tool-369 manually."
    exit 1
fi

```
